zh.Chantry For Hatfield, , England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈特菲爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne De Audley於1283年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley16歲，母親Isolde de Mortimer21歲。她於1293年與Adam FitzSimon在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1336年在英國享年53歲。

zh-hans.Chantry For Hatfield, , England: 英国英格兰賀特福爾哈特菲爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne De Audley于1283年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley16岁，母亲Isolde de Mortimer21岁。她于1293年与Adam FitzSimon在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1336年在英国享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne De Audley was born in 1283, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, was 16 and her mother, Isolde de Mortimer, was 21. She married Adam FitzSimon in 1293, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1336, in England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne De Audley est née en 1283, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Isolde de Mortimer, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Adam FitzSimon en 1293, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1336, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne De Audley 1283 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley 16 und ihre Mutter Isolde de Mortimer 21. Sie hat 1293 in England, United Kingdom Adam FitzSimon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1336 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne De Audley è nata il nel 1283 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Isolde de Mortimer, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Adam FitzSimon nel 1293, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1336, nel England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Anne De Audleyが1283年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audleyは16歳，母Isolde de Mortimerは21歳であった。1293年にイギリスイギリスでAdam FitzSimonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1336年にイギリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne De Audley(이)가 1283년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolde de Mortimer(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1293년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Adam FitzSimon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 영국에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Chantry For Hatfield, , England: Hatfield, Heorotfordscír, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne De Audley nasceu em 1283, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Isolde de Mortimer, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam FitzSimon em 1293, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1336, em Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne De Audley родилась в 1283 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolde de Mortimer, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam FitzSimon в 1293 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1336 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne De Audley nació en 1283, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Isolde de Mortimer, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Adam FitzSimon en 1293, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1336, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
